name: Reliance on File Name or Extension of Externally-Supplied File
description: The product determines how to handle a file based on its filename or extension rather than its actual content. Attackers can exploit this by uploading malicious files with misleading extensions (e.g., '.php.gif') to achieve code execution, expose system data, or bypass upload restrictions.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node accepts file uploads where the CONTROL node makes security decisions based solely on file name or extension from META data, without a TRANSFORM or CONTROL node that inspects actual file content (magic bytes, MIME type validation). The file then flows to STORAGE or is processed by EXTERNAL services.
